examples: A network of dark, dense clouds of dust and gas sprawls across the constellation Vela.
The planet is in the constellation of Vela, measures around 3.6 times the Earth's mass.
Vela A is about 3, 300 light-years away. This image spans about 130 light-years in space.
Vela has 29 Mexico caps, scoring nine times, and appeared at his first World Cup last summer in South Africa.
Vela was also wanted by Bolton, who earlier in the month confirmed they had made an approach to take him on loan.
